import asyncio


async def fetch_user(user_id):
    response = await http_client.get(f"/users/{user_id}")
    return response.json()


async def process_batch(items):
    for item in items:
        fetch_user(item["user_id"])

    results = await asyncio.gather(*[
        fetch_user(item["user_id"]) for item in items
    ])
    return results


async def send_notifications(users):
    for user in users:
        notify_user(user["email"], user["name"])


async def sync_data(source, dest):
    data = await source.read_all()
    dest.write_all(data)

    refresh_cache()
